info.title: Regiondo API documentation
info.description:
The Regiondo API (API Workflow diagram ) is organized around RESTful. Our API is designed to have predictable, resource-oriented URLs and to use HTTP response codes to indicate API errors. We use built-in HTTP features, like HTTP verbs, which can be understood by off-the-shelf HTTP clients.
Currently only JSON format will be returned in all responses from the API, including errors and data.

The API limit for a 24-hour period is 50,000 requests. This limit is designed to ensure an optimal experience for all users. If this limit is surpassed, usage of the API will be blocked for several minutes to protect the stability of the system. Additionally, the limit is set to a maximum of 2083 requests per hour and 157 requests every 5 minutes. If this limit is exceeded, access to the API will be blocked for at least 5 minutes or until the request rate meets or beats the limit. We recommend using webhooks to reduce the amount of API calls and to ensure that the API limits are not exceeded.

You can find code example on our GitHub repository
Please find the Regiondo API change log in our Knowledge base

start_date_time.description: Date and time of the event

booking_cut_off_hours.description: Configured booking cut-off time for current product

bookable_until_time.description: Calculated date and time until event is bookable

is_available.description: 1 if available, 0 if not (most probably sold out)

event_capacity.description: Total capacity of the event (max configured number of attendees or tickets)

qty_available.description: Total qty available at the moment. Please note, it's general available qty what can differs depending on option id

qty_available_by_option.description: Qty for each option available at the moment

regiondo_variation_id.description: Main id of the variation in Regiondo ecosystem

accountLocale.description: Object including local name and local code

id.description: Id of attendee to use for detailed description request

firstname.description: First name of attendee or buyer

lastname.description: Last name of attendee or buyer

firstname.description: First name of attendee or buyer

lastname.description: Last name of attendee or buyer

ticket_valid_until.description: Validity date and time of the ticket

ticket_validated.description: When and who validated the ticket (empty if not)

orderOptions.description: Additional custom order options for attendee

order_options.description: Additional custom order options for attendee

PaymentAvailable.description: All available payment method for the checkout

object_expected.description: Name of defined object expected for purchase

PaymentDataCreditcard.description: Payment data fieldset for payment with credit card

reservationCode.description: Unique reservation code, reference got from our system for reserved shopping cart item.

ticketCodeReference.description: Reference object to future ticket codes objects

CartItem.description: Cart item object, which should describe object in customer's shopping cart

product_id.description: Entity ID from collection or details of Product object.

option_id.description: Required for reservations, totals calculation and purchase if cart item type is bookingdate or bookingvariation (normal ticket)

value.description: Required if cart item type is regiondocert (value voucher)

date_time.description: Reservation needed/used only for products with calendar, when appointment needed.

reservation_code.description: Reservation code if exists - needed on purchase to guarantee stock availability

external_item_id.description: Optional reference ID on external object. This value will be saved and returned as reference after purchase

source_type.description: Optional Source type for order options, POS=1, Ticketshop=0, by default is POS

as_gift.description: Set this flat to 1 if you want to buy product as a gift. Purchasing a gift product does not require appointment date and time information.

PurchaseCartItem.description: Cart item object, which should describe object in customer's shopping cart

product_id.description: Entity ID from collection or details of Product object.

option_id.description: Required for reservations, totals calculation and purchase if cart item type is bookingdate or bookingvariation (normal ticket)

value.description: Required if cart item type is regiondocert (value voucher)

date_time.description: Reservation needed/used only for products with calendar, when appointment needed.

reservation_code.description: Reservation code if exists - needed on purchase to guarantee stock availability

external_item_id.description: Optional reference ID on external object. This value will be saved and returned as reference after purchase

external_ticket_ids.description: Optional array with reference IDs for the tickets

source_type.description: Optional Source type for order options, POS=1, Ticketshop=0, by default is POS

as_gift.description: Set this flat to 1 if you want to buy product as a gift. Purchasing a gift product does not require appointment date and time information.

attendee.description: Object with all fields for one attendee. Please note you need to send as many of attendee objects, as many qtys per each option you have in your purchase request.

option_id.description: Option id attendee is linked to

id.description: It need for the value field

date_time.description: Date and time of the event in Y-m-d H:i format

contact_data_required.description: List of required contact data fields

buyer_data_required.description: Array of buyer data objects required on purchase request additionally to usual contact data given in contact_data_required

attendee_data_required.description: Array of attendee objects required on purchase request additionally to usual contact data given in contact_data_required. It depend on a product if it's configured to request specific attendee data or not. If this is not empty in your reservation response, please take this object, copy it in your purchase request and fill the values for every field. Please note you need to send as many attendee objects in your purchase request, as qtys for every sale item summarized.

date_time.description: Date and time of the event in Y-m-d H:i format

CheckoutTotalsInputData.description: Object to collect data for checkout totals calculation

items.description: List of items in customer's shopping cart

source_type.description: Optional Source type for order options, POS=1, Ticketshop=0, API = 2, by default is POS

return_only_totals.description: Flag to return only totals in the Response, 0 || 1, by default is 0

contact_data_required.description: List of required contact data fields

buyer_data_required.description: Array of buyer data objects required on purchase request additionally to usual contact data given in contact_data_required

attendee_data_required.description: Array of attendee objects including data required on purchase request additionally to usual contact data given in contact_data_required

payments_available.description: Array of available payment methods and data

discount_info.description: Array of discount items related to order or quote

OrderOptionFieldsInputData.description: Object to collect data for checkout order options fields

items.description: List of items in customer's shopping cart

source_type.description: Optional Source type for order options, POS=1, Ticketshop=0, by default is POS

buyer_data_required.description: Array of buyer data objects required on purchase request

attendee_data_required.description: Array of attendee objects including data required on purchase request

OrderOptionFieldsInputItem.description: Cart item object, which should describe object in customer's shopping cart

product_id.description: Entity ID from collection or details of Product object.

option_id.description: Required if cart item type is bookingdate or bookingvariation (normal ticket)

AvaialableAssigneesInputData.description: Object to collect available assignees for order

items.description: List of items in customer's shopping cart

source_type.description: Optional Source type for order options, POS=1, Ticketshop=0, by default is POS

AvaialableAssigneesInputItem.description: Cart item object, which should describe object in customer's shopping cart

AvaialableAssigneesResponse.description: List of assignees available for given order and list of pre-selected assignees

available_assignees.description: List of assignees available for given order

contactData.description: Key-value object containing contact data of customer

email.description: Email which will be used for further communication with customer (regarding appointments, booking changes etc)

telephone.description: Phone number which will be used for further communication with customer (regarding appointments, booking changes etc)

purchaseContactData.description: Key-value object containing contact data of customer

email.description: Email which will be used for further communication with customer (regarding appointments, booking changes etc)

telephone.description: Phone number which will be used for further communication with customer (regarding appointments, booking changes etc)

bookingContactData.description: Key-value object containing contact data of customer

email.description: Email which will be used for further communication with customer (regarding appointments, booking changes etc)

telephone.description: Phone number which will be used for further communication with customer (regarding appointments, booking changes etc)

GiftRedeemItem.description: Gift redeem entity that is generated from redeeming gift voucher

Ticket.description: Ticket object including ticket code, preferred barcode type, expiration date etc

validity_status.description: Status describing the validity of the code

ticket_external_id.description: Optional reference ID for the ticket

attendee_data.description: Attendee data if it was passed on purchase

gift_redeem_item.description: Gift redeem entity related to ticket

SoldItem.description: Sold item object with purchase details including titles, qty, status and ticket codes

unique_item_id.description: Unique id for current sold item

booking_key.description: Code of booking item is grouped to. Can be the same for several items

ticket_codes.description: List of available ticket codes. Empty array when processing or waiting confirmation

resources.description: List of used resources for the current item if it's configured for the product, empty array if not

event_date_time.description: Date of event ticket available for (if defined)

row_total_incl_tax.description: Total amount for current item including tax

row_total_excl_tax.description: Total amount for current item excluding tax

row_total_tax_amount.description: Total amount of tax for current item

price_per_one_incl_tax.description: Price per one ticket including tax

price_per_one_excl_tax.description: Price per one ticket excluding tax

currency.description: Currency of current item amounts (usually all the purchase items has the same currency

sales_channel.description: Title of the sales channel describing were the booking came from. Possible values are Marketplace, Own Ticketshop, POS or name of the distribution partner

external_id.description: Optional external id if it was sent in request

PurchaseInputData.description: Object to collect input data for purchase

items.description: List of items in customer's shopping cart

buyer_data.description: Array of buyer data objects. Required for some of products. If required, returned in totals response as buyer_data_required

attendee_data.description: Array of attendee objects with data required for some of products. If required, returned in totals response as attendee_data_required

skip_customer_validation.description: Skip validation of contact and custom data of a customer

sub_id.description: Optional sub_id value will be saved and returned with order status

source_type.description: Optional Source type for order options, POS=1, Ticketshop=0, by default is POS

printer_html.description: Optional print option code, Ex. print_option_1, by default is print_option_0 (No printer). Check in 'Checkout / Get available printers' section for all printer codes.

payment.description: Optional payment method data, default is 'api_external'

PurchaseData.description: Response with info about placed order

order_number.description: Public order number used in all the invoices and emails

sales_channel.description: Title of the sales channel describing were the booking came from. Possible values are Marketplace, Own Ticketshop, POS, name of the distribution partner or on rare occasions - unspecified

payment_method.description: Used payment method title. For all API placed purchases, it would be API external payment

contact_data.description: Key-value list of customer contact data used on purchase

buyer_data.description: Array of field objects with data required for some of products. If required, returned in totals response as buyer_data_required

printer_html_link.description: Optional printer html href link, if it was required. The link is valid for 60 minutes. After that new link with 'Get purchase update' could be generated.

printer_html_links.description: Optional printer html href links. The links are valid for 60 minutes. After that new links could be generated with 'Get purchase update'.

discount_info.description: Array of discount items related to order or quote

PurchaseDataGet.description: Response with info about placed order

order_number.description: Public order number used in all the invoices and emails

sales_channel.description: Title of the sales channel describing were the booking came from. Possible values are Marketplace, Own Ticketshop, POS, name of the distribution partner or on rare occasions - unspecified

payment_method.description: Used payment method title. For all API placed purchases, it would be API external payment

contact_data.description: Key-value list of customer contact data used on purchase

buyer_data.description: Array of field objects with data required for some of products. If required, returned in totals response as buyer_data_required

printer_html_link.description: Optional printer html href link, if it was required. The link is valid for 60 minutes. After that new link with 'Get purchase update' could be generated.

printer_html_links.description: Optional printer html href links. The links are valid for 60 minutes. After that new links could be generated with 'Get purchase update'.

discount_info.description: Array of discount items related to order or quote

PurchaseUpdateDetails.description: This object includes description and a list of all the affected items during the current change.

contains.description: Describing the contents of items included in this object. Expected values are: items_confirmed,items_rejected,items_canceled or items_altered

items.description: List of affected by current change items. Expected object types depend on the property -contain- included in this object. In case if it's items_canceled the list includes CancelTicketItem objects (search this documentation for the definition), in other cases the list will include SoldItem objects for every affected item in particular change request.

PurchaseDataPush.description: This object is not for making requests or receiving responses from Regiondo API. This is only to describe the format of data we push to your side as a callback. In case if Callback-URL logic is configured, each order update action such as appointment confirmed, appointment rejected, ticket canceled or booking altered, we send this object to the specified Callback-URL. Please check the Regiondo Pro dashboard on the API access configuration page

channel.description: At the moment only one channel available: regiondo_api

updated_items_details.description: Object which describes the changes in particular push request. Please note, it will include always only affected purchase items. So if you need to check the complete purchase, see the -purchase_data- property

full_purchase_data.description: Each data push together with actually details of current update, listed in update_details object, Regiondo Pro will send also the full purchase details actual for the moment of request. You can use this data to verify the status of all the purchase items in your system and match it with actual state in Regiondo Pro system.

BookingItem.description: Booking item information: option, variation, qty

external_id.description: Optional external id if it was sent in request

BookingData.description: Response with info about placed order

booking_key.description: Unique code of booking or permanent reservation

type.description: Type of returned entity. 'booking' - booking, 'offline' - permanent reservation

sales_channel.description: Title of the sales channel describing were the booking came from. Possible values are Marketplace, Own Ticketshop, POS, name of the distribution partner or on rare occasions - unspecified

order_number.description: Public order number used in all the invoices and emails. Not present for permanent reservation.

discount_info.description: Array of discount items related to order or quote

contact_data.description: Key-value list of customer contact data used on purchase

buyer_data.description: Array of field objects with data required for some of products.

Assignee.description: Infromation about assignee of a booking

option_id.description: Option ID. Deprecated - please use property 'options' instead.

date_applied_for.description: Alias for event_date_time. Date and time of event. Deprecated, use property event_date_time instead

created_at.description: Date of creation of booking. Value in Europe/Berlin timezone

updated_at.description: Booking Update Date. Value in Europe/Berlin timezone

option_name.description: Option name. Deprecated - please use property 'options' instead.

qty.description: Actual number of participants. Deprecated - please use property 'options' instead.

qty_cancelled.description: Number of cancelled participants. Deprecated - please use property 'options' instead.

first_name.description: Buyer first name. Deprecated - please use property contact_data

last_name.description: Buyer last name. Deprecated - please use property contact_data

email.description: Email of the buyer. Deprecated - please use property contact_data

phone_number.description: Phone number of the buyer. Deprecated - please use property contact_data

distribution_channel_partner.description: Optional partner name (usually not empty when `distribution_channel` is 'partner'

resources.description: Array of used resources in booking

contact_data.description: Key-value list of buyer contact data used on purchase

documents.description: Booking documents (sales receipt, invoice, tax invoice, invoice correction)

url.description: Url to download the PDF document

consumption.description: Number of used resouces for booking

subscription_last_changed.description: Date and time the member's info was last changed.

language.description: If set/detected, the language of the subscriber.

regiondo_product_id.description: Main id of the product in Regiondo ecosystem

regiondo_supplier_id.description: Main id of the supplier in Regiondo ecosystem

original_product_name.description: Original product name in Regiondo ecosystem

regiondo_variation_id.description: Main id of the variation in Regiondo ecosystem

regiondo_product_id.description: Main id of the product in Regiondo ecosystem

stock_limited.description: Returns 1 or 0 depending if stock is limited

regiondo_option_id.description: Main id of the option in Regiondo ecosystem

regiondo_variation_id.description: Main id of the variation in Regiondo ecosystem

min_qty_to_sell.description: Min quantity per order if configured (null if not)

max_qty_to_sell.description: Max quantity per order if configured (null if not)

duration_type.description: Duration unit type if configured (null if not)

sales_start_dt.description: Start of sale if configured (ISO8601 formatted date and time if configured, null if not)

sales_end_dt.description: End of sale if configured (ISO8601 formatted date and time if configured, null if not)

qty.description: Configured or available (depending if request includes event date and time) qty for particular option

booking_cut_off_hours.description: Configured booking cut-off time for current product

start_date_time.description: Optional property exist only in case if qty calculated for particular date and time. Must be in ISO8601 format
Date and time of the event in ISO8601 format

booking_cut_off_hours.description: Configured booking cut-off time for current product

bookable_until_time.description: Calculated date and time until event is bookable ISO8601 format

is_available.description: 1 if available, 0 if not (most probably sold out)

event_capacity.description: Total capacity of the event (max configured number of attendees or tickets)

qty_available.description: Total qty available at the moment. Please note, it's general available qty what can differs depending on option id

qty_available_by_option.description: Qty for each option available at the moment

regiondo_variation_id.description: Main id of the variation in Regiondo ecosystem

IntegrationHoldItem.description: Data of the item to hold

hold_items.description: Array of all items to be hold

start_date_time.description: Date and time of the event in ISO8601 format
Date and time of the event in ISO8601 format

regiondo_supplier_id.description: Main id of the supplier in Regiondo ecosystem

company_name.description: Full company name of the supplier

company_short_name.description: Short company name of the supplier

ProductaAvailOptionsList.description: List of available options for specified variation_id and date and time

sort_order.description: Used to order options in the list if needed / if specified

min_qty_to_sell.description: Limitation for minimum possible qty to buy (for example some products can be configured that customer should by more then two etc)

max_qty_to_sell.description: Limitation how much items can buy one customer in same time (cart level)

original_price.description: Original price from the product owner (usually price which customer can find on their side)

regiondo_price.description: Price which configured to be used with Regiondo portal (usually less then original price)

vat_percentage_val.description: VAT information - used mostly in the shopping cart as an information for customer

duration_value.description: How long duration is (described by owner)

sales_start_dt.description: If set, provide date, when sales starts. In such case we know that it is not sold out, but going to be on sale some day.

sales_end_dt.description: If set, provide date, when sale have to be end. Useful for dayte based events, like concert, party etc.

title.description: Payment method title (label), Ex. Cash Register payment (dashboard)

name.description: Form field id, Ex. unpaid_offline, paid_cc, company

title.description: Form field title (label), Ex. Unpaid, Credit card

required.description: Optional form required for 'cashregister' payment type

code.description: Payment method code, Ex. cashregister, default is 'api_external'

options.description: Optional 'name:value' data for the selected payment method. Possible payment options should be checked with 'payments_available' response from 'Get totals for items' call

name.description: Optional 'name:value' data for the selected payment method.

DiscountInfoItem.description: Infromation about individual coupon code or value voucher related to order or quote

code.description: Coupon code or value voucher code

is_valid.description: Shows whether discount item is valid (applied)

permanentReservationAttendee.description: Object with all fields for one attendee. Please note you need to send as many of attendee objects, as many qtys per each option you have in your purchase request.

reservation_code.description: Reservation code if exists - needed on purchase to guarantee stock availability

If this is not empty in your reservation response, please take this object, copy it in your purchase request and fill the values for every field. discount_info.description: Array of discount items related to order or quote

If this is not empty in your reservation response, please take this object, copy it in your purchase request and fill the values for every field. description.description: Printer description, Ex. Ticket Format: 203mm (8.00) breit, 82mm (3.25) hoch

variation_id.description: Unique identifier of variation. Required for request available date/time/options in case of products with appointment.

available_dates.description: Array of available dates with time, needed in case if appointment needed, to build calendar or just list possible dates. Deprecated - please use property 'available_dates_times' instead.

available_dates_times.description: Array of available dates with times in flat format. For day tickets use HH:mm:ss-HH:mm:ss (e.g. 09:00:00-15:00:00), for regular tickets use HH:mm:ss (e.g. 09:00:00). Format: {YYYY-MM-DD: [HH:mm:ss, HH:mm:ss-HH:mm:ss, ...]}

date.description: Date, when variation available. Note, options and final price are not given yet, have to be fetched in separate request by chosen date and variation_id.

ProductVariationDatesTimes.description: Array of available dates when variation available

TicketOpeningTimes.description: Array of opening times. Not always available.

days.description: list of available days for this range

ProductGallery.description: List of links to all product images

original_price.description: Base original price used for listing etc. Final original price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

category_ids.description: Key of array item is a category id.

base_price.description: Base price used for listing etc. Final price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

disable_print_at_home.description: In some cases ticket PDF generation with code is not allowed. It means: delivery by email not possible, only by post (supplier will send the ticket him self or our support team will send the ticket).

values.description: Key of array item is a value id. Value is Label

AttributeForNavigation.description: Attribute that can be used for layered navigation

type.description: Attribute type, one of: category, tag, price or navigation

AttributeForNavigationOption.description: Option of an attribute that can be used for layered navigation

product_count.description: Number of products having this option

data.description: Key of array item is a value id. Value is Type

percent.description: Value described in percent from 0 to 100

ProductInListByDate.description: Product details required in listing by date mode

base_price.description: Base price used for listing etc. Final price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

original_price.description: Base original price used for listing etc. Final original price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

first_available_at.description: Next available time for particular date.

variations.description: List of first available product variation

more_available.description: This flag will be set to '1' if more start time available for particular date, otherwise, when only one time exists, this flag will be set to '0'.

appointment_needed.description: This flag will be set to '1' if appointment is needed, '2' if each appointment needs manual confirmation by supplier and '0' if no any appointment needed for the product.

ProductInListByTimeslots.description: Product details required in listing by date mode

base_price.description: Base price used for listing etc. Final price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

original_price.description: Base original price used for listing etc. Final original price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

variations.description: List of available product variation by timeslots

more_available.description: This flag will be set to '1' if more start time available for particular date, otherwise, when only one time exists, this flag will be set to '0'.

appointment_needed.description: This flag will be set to '1' if appointment is needed, '2' if each appointment needs manual confirmation by supplier and '0' if no any appointment needed for the product.

original_price.description: Base original price used for listing etc. Final original price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

category_ids.description: Key of array item is a category id.

base_price.description: Base price used for listing etc. Final price can be calculated only after date/variation/option selection.

booking_notice_period.description: Preparation and planning time for offer (in hours)

video_url.description: List of links to product videos (optional)

image_url.description: List of links to all product images

image_sort_order.description: List of links to all product images and positions

commission_rate.description: Percentage commission rate for distribution portal

operator_information.description: Operator information. This information is only necessary when a partner requests it

reseller_avg_rating.description: Operator rating with a number of reviews

rating_image_url.description: URL to an image, that shows the rating

web_url.description: URL to the operator Tripadvisor account

base_price.description: Base price used for listing etc.

shareable.description: Availability cannot be shared between products

percent.description: Value described in percent from 0 to 100

value.description: Value described in digits from 1 to 5

assignedTag.description: Object including tag id and name

appliedProvisionRules.description: Object including provision rules applied on purchase

expectedBillingAmounts.description: Expected billing amounts calculated on purchase. May vary at the end of billing month depending on newly appeared actions, in example, cancellations

payout_amount.description: Expected payout amount (calculated at the end of billing month, may differ depending on other actions, i.e. cancellations

order_number.description: Public order number used in all the invoices and emails. Please use order_number in GET /checkout/purchase action to retrieve complete purchase details including ticket codes and order totals

created_at.description: Date of creation of booking. Value in Europe/Berlin timezone

updated_at.description: Booking Update Date. Value in Europe/Berlin timezone

validity_status.description: Status describing the validity of the code

applied_provision_rules.description: System provision and fees applied on purchase

expected_billing_amounts.description: System provision and fees applied on purchase

distribution_channel_partner.description: Optional partner name (usually not empty when `distribution_channel` is 'partner'

agent_user_name.description: Optional agent name (usually not empty when `distribution_channel` is 'pos')

contact_data.description: Key-value list of buyer contact data used on purchase

buyer_data.description: Array of buyer field objects with data required for some of products.

attendee_data.description: Array of attendee field objects with data required for some of products.

resources.description: Array of used resources in booking

tags.description: Assigned tags object including id and name

order_number.description: Public order number used in all the invoices and emails. Please use order_number in GET /checkout/purchase action to retrieve complete purchase details including ticket codes and order totals

validity_status.description: Status describing the validity of the code

applied_provision_rules.description: System provision and fees applied on purchase

expected_billing_amounts.description: System provision and fees applied on purchase

distribution_channel_partner.description: Optional partner name (usually not empty when `distribution_channel` is 'partner'

agent_user_name.description: Optional agent name (usually not empty when `distribution_channel` is 'pos')

contact_data.description: Key-value list of buyer contact data used on purchase

buyer_data.description: Array of buyer field objects with data required for some of products.

attendee_data.description: Array of attendee field objects with data required for some of products.

resources.description: Array of used resources in booking

tags.description: Assigned tags object including id and name

type.description: Type of the offer (Normal ticket, Value voucher, Merchandising item or Bundle offer)

statuses.description: List of all the offer statuses

datetime.description: Event datetime in local timezone of the product (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

TimeslotsFilter.description: Filter to apply to the list of timeslots for suppliers endpoint

datetime.description: Event datetime in local timezone of the product (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

ticketToValidate.description: Ticket object including ticket code to be validated

ticketValidationResult.description: Result object for one ticket including ticket code and status of validation

success.description: Returns 1 if ticket successfully validated, 0 if not

status.description: Number from 0 to 4 which describes operation status in details: 0 - failure, 1 - success, 2 - already validated before, 3 - validated by another user, 4 - validation period expired

data.description: Array of available dates with Array of times for specified variation_id. Deprecated - please use property 'dates_times' instead.

dates_times.description: Array of available dates with Array of times for specified variation_id.

ProductAvailabilityTimes.description: Array of possible time to choose

result.description: Message could be 'ok' or 'error' if operation not success

category_id.name: category_id
category_id.description: Filter products by category ID  or IDs (comma separated)

tag.name: tag
tag.description: Filter products by tag ID (comma separated IDs supported). Use /tags API call to get list of available tags. You can manage Tags and assign your products in the Regiondo Pro dashboard, on the Categories page ( https://www.regiondo.de/resellers/account/mycategories ). NOTE: when only one tag used for filtering AND it is not a search request, the result will be ordered by the order configured in that tag (in dashboard), a

tagcondition.name: tagcondition
tagcondition.description: This option allows to change condition used in filtering by TAG. By default OR logic is used (for example: sport OR outside; sport AND outside).

is_appointment_needed.name: is_appointment_needed
is_appointment_needed.description: Filter products by appointment type: appointment required or not for particular product. Do we need date selection for product or not.

disable_print_at_home.name: disable_print_at_home
disable_print_at_home.description: In some cases ticket PDF generation with code is not allowed. It means: delivery by email not possible, only by post (supplier will send the ticket him self or our support team will send the ticket).

location_id.name: location_id
location_id.description: Filter products by city, region or point of interest using location ID. NOTE: you can filter only by location ID or by coordinates in the same request.

location_type.name: location_type
location_type.description: Location type is required when location ID is specified..

geo_coordinates.name: geo_coordinates
geo_coordinates.description: Filter products by geographic coordinates: LATITUDE,LONGITUDE (Ex.: 48.116915, 11.592240). NOTE: you can filter only by location id or by coordinates in the same request. If you send coordinates, location id is ignored.

radius.name: radius
radius.description: Filter products by radius (in kilometers) around specified coordinates (in this case geo_coordinates parameters is required). If you send coordinates without radius specification, default radius is used

suppress_response_code.name: suppress_response_code
suppress_response_code.description: Suppress returning codes. In this case API will always answer with code 200, even if error happens, but error code and error message will still presented in the response body.

sandboxauth.name: sandboxauth
sandboxauth.description: When this option is TRUE, it allows, on sandbox server, do simple Authorization, just by valid PUBLIC API Key. It used by default from our API Explorer UI. ALso, for developers this flag could be helpful to make debug / test requests with some tool which do not support HMAC algorithm. NOTE: this flag affects ONLY in requests to our SANDBOX server: sandbox-api.regiondo.com. Set this flag to FALSE to check/test if HMAC encryption works correct on your side.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: his is the number of individual objects that are returned in each page. Maximum value: 250

offset.name: offset
offset.description: This offsets the start of each page by the number specified.

store_locale.name: store_locale
store_locale.description: This is optional alternative parameter to pass desired locale, like 'de-DE'. Usually HTTP header 'Accept-Language' have to be used for this purpose. This parameter, if used, has highest priority then  'Accept-Language' in the HTTP header.

get.description: Get update including status and confirmed ticket codes for the order placed via API previously. Please use this action always when you made purchase with asynchronous ticket processing or in case when appointment needed to be confirmed by supplier manually

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: Order number you received on purchase

parameters.name: printer_html
parameters.description: Optional print option code, Ex. print_option_1, by default is print_option_0 (No printer). Check in 'Checkout / Get available printers' section for all printer codes.

202.description: Return error code when request is not possible (look for `errorCheckoutObject` in documentation)

post.description: Place booking in Regiondo Pro system. You will have valid ticket codes which you can pass to your customer. We will also notify the supplier via email or sms as well as place booking in his dashboard. So supplier can see and manage it easily. Please note, if you want to receive updates for all the changes happening with your bookings, you can configure Callback-URL in your Regiondo Pro dashboard. This means i.e. confirmed or rejected appointments, canceled tickets or altered bookings. Regiondo Pro will send POST requests with JSON formatted data in the request body. This also allows you to leave sync_tickets_processing parameter disabled because in this case tickets generation will be done asynchronously on background. As fast as bookings are confirmed and tickets generated, your system will get an update on specified Callback-URL. To configure it please check the page with your API keys in your Regiondo Dashboard: Shop Configuration > Website Integration > Api Configuration. Please search also for the definition of PurchaseDataPush object in PDF version of this documentation.

parameters.name: sync_tickets_processing
parameters.description: Keep this disabled to have faster purchase creation. Enabled synchronous tickets processing means stay connected until all the tickets for purchase are completely generated. If this flag is set to 'true', you'll get complete purchase info as fast as it's ready. If this flag is set to 'false', general information about purchase returned faster but you need to make additional GET requests to retrieve updated status of purchase on your own or configure Callback-URL in Regiondo Pro dashboard. In this case your system will get POST request immediately when tickets are ready. Please search for the definition of PurchaseDataPush object in PDF version of this documentation.

parameters.name: send_tickets_to_customer
parameters.description: If this flag is set to 'true', we email order confirmation and tickets to customer. Otherwise you need to deliver tickets to customer yourself. Please note, even if this flag is set to 'false', we allow supplier himself to initiate send tickets to customer through the Regiondo dashboard.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency of prices to be returned. Default value is the one configured as currency during your Regiondo account registration

parameters.name: tracking_channel
parameters.description: Optional tracking_channel

202.description: Return error code when request is not possible (look for `errorCheckoutObject` in documentation)

post.description: Cancel sold tickets by given reference ids. You can cancel ticket codes for bookings placed via API only. Please note we do not make any refunds and do not notify customer about cancellations for bookings placed via API. Do this on your sight if needed. Supplier will be notified about the cancellation. Please keep in mind Regiondo Pro allows suppliers to cancel bookings partially or completely via Regiondo Pro dashboard. In this case customer will be notified automatically by Regiondo Pro booking management system.

parameters.name: reference_ids
parameters.description: Comma separated reference ids of tickets to be canceled

202.description: Return error code when request is not possible (look for `errorCancel` in documentation)

get.description: Get list of all available products (with pagination)

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Attribute to add sorting to the result. Default value means ascending sorting by product_id or by position inside tag if tag filter applied. Distance value means ascending sorting by calculated distance from given geo_coordinates to the product. Please note if you set sorting by distance, geo_coordinates are required. Otherwise sorting preference is ignored and default value is used. If you're using filter by tag, sorting attribute will be also ignored because sorting will be automatically applied by product position inside tag. And last exception, sorting attribute is ignored in case of search by keyword (kwd). In this case search result will be returned always sorted by search score (build on best keyword match)

parameters.name: active_only
parameters.description: If set to true then show only active products, otherwise (default) return all products.

get.description: This is expected to be used by Regiondo Suppliers. Get the list of all sold items including ticket codes and calculated amounts and commissions

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: Filter items by comma-separated order number values

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: Filter bookings by date range, comma separated as DATE_FROM,DATE_TO (Ex.: 2015-01-01,2015-02-01). You don't need to set time - 00:00:00 used for date from, 23:59:59 for date to.

parameters.name: date_range_by
parameters.description: Filter by (Date bought, Date of event). Use with param date_range.

parameters.name: product_ids
parameters.description: Filter bookings by Product ID  or IDs (comma separated)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter bookings by type.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: Filter sold items by payment method.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter sold items by channel.
